rationale: Educ. Code §38.212 governs parental notice of school safety policies and is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: If a school district, open-enrollment charter school, or private school implements a policy under this subchapter, the district or school shall provide written notice of the policy to a parent or guardian of each student enrolled in the district or school.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns school parental notice, not property tax homestead exemptions.
